shots.action: Morning in the receiving area: drums and cartons stacked, a cart waiting under flat fluorescent light.
On the cart, an unlabeled container of degreaser sweats under the lights - decanted last shift, never marked.
The splash: as Priya lifts the container the loose cap lets go and solvent sheets across her forearm and cheek.
shots.vo_line: It takes a third of a second.

shots.action: A technician handles the container at the bench, sleeves rolled, bare hands, face uncovered.
Static shot: the spill kit and safety data sheets mounted by the door, seconds away.
Priya at the eyewash station, water running the full fifteen minutes while a coworker reads the label aloud.
Corrective: the same transfer done right - labeled container, ppe gloves on, face shield down, cap torqued.
shots.vo_line: Fifteen seconds of labeling. The whole morning back.
